article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.1. Attachment 1 - Proposed E1, I1, PM1, PM2 and AM 1 District Schedules (Revised) 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to vote on new zoning rules for industrial, parks, and farm land
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on a proposed zoning bylaw that would set out what businesses and uses are allowed — and under what conditions — in Employment (E1), Industrial (I1), Parks (PM1), Institutional (PM2), and Agriculture (AM1) zones across the city.
briefs.action_required: Check which zone your property sits in and review the proposed permitted uses before Council votes.
